heading: Create a {+fts} Index on the Materialized View
body:
In this section, you can learn how to create a MongoDB Search index on the `monthlyPhoneTransactions`
collection.

In your terminal, connect to your Atlas cloud-hosted
deployment or local deployment from [mongosh](mongodb-shell). For detailed
instructions on how to connect, see
[Connect to a Deployment](mongodb-shell/connect).

**Input:**

```shell
 use sample_supplies
```

**Output:**

```shell
switched to db sample_supplies
```

**Input:**

```shell
db.monthlyPhoneTransactions.createSearchIndex(
  "monthlySalesIndex",
  {
    "mappings": {
      "dynamic": true
    }
  }
)
```

**Output:**

```
monthlySalesIndex
```
